name: Lumberjacks Indoor Golf
about: Lumberjacks Indoor Golf is a dedicated indoor golf simulator venue operating in two locations, Ferndale and Bellingham. The facility provides a space for golfers of all skill levels to practice their game or play virtual rounds on a simulator. While the exact technology used in their simulators is not specified, the establishment offers a range of services including lessons, leagues, memberships, and event hosting for private parties, corporate functions, and fundraisers. Booking is managed through an online system, and a clear 12-hour cancellation policy is enforced, with the possibility of cancellation fees for late notices and a full charge for no-shows.
why_golfers_like_it: Multiple convenient locations in Ferndale and Bellingham
Dedicated space for both practice and virtual play
Availability of leagues, lessons, and memberships for committed players

food_and_drink.notes: Facility can be rented for parties including birthday celebrations.
No mention of an on-site bar or alcohol service.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The provided text does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to contact the venue directly to inquire about equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The text does not mention any policy on outside food or drink. For private events, the focus is on the venue rental itself.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website content does not provide an estimated time for playing a full 18 holes on the simulators.

faq.question: Is Lumberjacks Indoor Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, they specifically mention birthday celebrations as a suitable event for their facility.
